docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-01-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (506/JR)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-12-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KU, FELIPE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES AT AUG-17-2020 HEARING, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER 11-20-18 ORDER. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,320.00 (ASSISTED BY ACCESS CENTER IN FILING OF CLAIM) FILED BY CHAN, NOEMI AS TO DEFENDANT KU, FELIPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-26-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES AT 3-26-20 HEARING, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER 11-20-18 ORDER. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NOEMI CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELIPE KU IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES WERE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF THE AGREED BALANCE OF $4000 BY INSTALLMENTS OF $300 ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON DEC-15-2018. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE AT THE HOME OF THE PLAINTIFF. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APR-19-2019 HEARING THEN THE MATTER IS TO BE CONTINUED FOR ONE MORE PROGRESS REPORT IN MARCH OF 2020. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MARCH 2020 HEARING MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MUST GIVE RECEIPTS FOR PAYMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
